params.html:
🚀 Instalando CCS Brand Assistant

Plataforma: {{platform}}  |  RAM: {{ram}}GB

params.message: which ollama && echo OLLAMA_OK || (curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && echo OLLAMA_INSTALLED)
where ollama 2>nul && echo OLLAMA_OK || (curl -L -o OllamaSetup.exe https://ollama.com/download/OllamaSetup.exe && start /wait OllamaSetup.exe /S && echo OLLAMA_INSTALLED)
ollama serve > /dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 5 && (curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags > /dev/null && echo OLLAMA_READY || echo OLLAMA_SKIP)
start /B ollama serve && ping -n 6 127.0.0.1 > nul && (curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags > nul && echo OLLAMA_READY || echo OLLAMA_SKIP)
{{ram < 6 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:1b' : ram < 12 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:3b' : 'ollama pull llama3.1:8b'}}

message: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium
pip install diffusers transformers accelerate safetensors

python -c "import os; [os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True) for d in ['data/agents','data/prompts/system','data/sessions','data/exports','data/brands','data/campaigns','data/audit','data/images']]; print('DIRS_OK')"
python -c "import os, shutil; src='defaults/agents.json'; dst='data/agents/agents.json'; shutil.copy2(src, dst) if not os.path.exists(dst) else None; print('AGENTS_OK')"

python -c "import os, shutil, glob; [shutil.copy2(f, 'data/prompts/system/') for f in glob.glob('defaults/prompts/*.md') if not os.path.exists('data/prompts/system/' + os.path.basename(f))]; print('PROMPTS_OK')"
python -c "import requests, fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, PIL; print('VERIFY_OK: all core modules installed')"

params.html:
✅ Instalación completada

Haz click en Iniciar para comenzar a usar CCS Brand Assistant.
CCS Brand Assistant instalado correctamente. Haz click en Iniciar.
